title.en: Whether the Daoless Tower has an Extreme Dao Tr...

content.en:
Whether the Daoless Tower has an Extreme Dao Treasure or not, he is not sure.

Although he was already a tower master of the Infinite Dao Tower, there was definitely no Extreme Treasure in the treasure house of the Infinite Dao Tower, unless there were Extreme Strange Treasures hidden in the hands of those Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers.

However, it is a secret and cannot be revealed unless it is actively exposed.

"It is worthy of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, this has not yet touched the core of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and it has encountered the transaction of the level of the Extreme Dao Treasure. Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

Of course, this Extreme Treasure is incomplete, otherwise it would not have been taken out and traded.

It's a pity that the treasures that can make the Extreme Dao True Body complete are also extremely rare, and unless someone else has a surplus treasure, they will not be taken out and traded.

The Extreme Dao True Body is the Extreme Dao Ancestral Body of the perfect controller of the True Realm.

After the Extreme Dao Ancestor of the Super Perfect Controller has cultivated to the extreme, after breaking the chain of the Extreme Dao and breaking through to the Void Realm, the Extreme Dao Ancestor will transform, and the Extreme Dao Ancestor at that time is called the Extreme Dao Void Body, the Extreme Dao Ancestor of the Perfect Controller of the True Realm is called the Extreme Dao True Body, and the Extreme Dao Ancestor of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller is called the Extreme Dao Extreme Body.

The Extreme Dao Void Body must be cultivated to above the Dacheng Realm in order to have any hope of breaking through to the Perfect Controller of the True Realm, and only when the Extreme Dao True Body breaks through to the Dacheng Realm can there be hope of breaking through to the Perfect Controller of the Extreme Realm.

Therefore, the cultivation of the Extreme Dao Void Body and the Extreme Dao True Body is very important, and for many people who have perfect control of the True Realm, they are extremely eager to cultivate the Extreme Dao True Body to the Dacheng Realm.

And this Lord of Dark Gold has been at the peak of the Extreme Dao True Body for an infinite number of years, so he naturally hopes to break through to the realm of the Great Cheng Extreme Dao True Body.

That's why he was willing to take out this damaged Extreme Dao Treasure.

"It's a pity that I don't have that kind of treasure, otherwise I'd really be interested in exchanging it for an Extreme Treasure!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, soon, the Lord of Dark Gold took away the Extreme Treasure and quickly left.

At this time, Ye Tian knew that there must have been an Extreme Dao creature who had contacted the Lord of Dark Gold and wanted to trade with the Lord of Dark Gold, but it was inconvenient to disclose, so he would definitely wait until he left the Xuandao Trading Area to trade.

After all, this kind of trading is not restricted, and it can still be traded in the outside world.

Next, Ye Tian continued to wander around the Xuandao trading area, I have to say that there are really many Extreme Dao treasures here, even if the Extreme Dao treasures of the entire Eternal Ruins are added together, I am afraid that there are not as many as here.

Extreme treasures are as common as ordinary treasures here, and their value is not high.

"If a super-level perfect controller sneaks here, as long as he is not discovered, he can definitely get a lot of extreme treasures, and there is a great hope of becoming a perfect controller of the Void Realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It's a pity that the super perfect controller doesn't dare to come in, even if he really sneaks in, he doesn't dare to go deep into the extreme deep sea, he only dares to hide in one place, otherwise once he is discovered, he will definitely die.

"I was able to replicate the body of the Void Sparrow, dive into the Extreme Deep Sea, and befriend the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, it's really lucky!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Ye Tian walked around for a long time, eager to pack up all the extreme treasures and take them away.

However, he didn't dare to snatch it, otherwise he would be dead, and he had no hope of taking the treasure here.

this day.

An auction in the Xuandao Trading Area began, similar to an auction for cultivators, and the currency of the auction was the Extreme Dao Coins.

Bang!!!!

In the midst of time and space, an extremely powerful Extreme Dao creature entered the auction venue.

Ye Tian also came, and he also wanted to see if there were any good things here.

At this moment, the arrival of a stone-like creature caused a commotion.

"Lord of Stone Pupils, he's actually here!"

"I didn't expect the Xuandao Trade Fair to attract this one!"

"Could it be that there is a treasure here that the Lord of the Stone Pupils needs?"

"It's very likely, after all, there will be some precious treasures in the Xuandao Trade Fair occasionally, and it is normal to attract the Lord of the Stone Pupil. "

While the other Extreme Dao creatures were talking about the Lord of the Stone Pupil who had arrived, Ye Tian also stared at the Lord of the Stone Pupil, and his heart was extremely shocked.

"This Lord of the Stone Pupil actually has the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment!"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

【Extreme Ancestor: Time】

Time Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu, this is the top Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu in the Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu and the Space Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu!

Although he hadn't copied the Extreme Dao Ancestor Fu yet, he would be able to do so soon, as his copying talent was about to be promoted.

Before, he had only seen the Void Soul Sparrow's Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, this was the second Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, and when he thought that it would not be long before he could have two Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments, how excited he was in his heart!

"This Lord of the Stone Pupil has the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, and his strength is probably not simple!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And he listened to other people's discussions about the Lord of Stone Pupils, and gradually got to know this Lord of Stone Pupils.

The Lord of the Stone Pupil, the perfect controller of the true realm, ranks at the extreme of the perfect controller of the true realm, the ultimate true body is perfect, one extreme path is perfect, and the three extreme paths are complete, and he has also created the extreme path palm technique.

You must know that Extreme Path creatures are not good at creating, and it is very rare for Extreme Path creatures to be able to create Extreme Dao Control Techniques, and most of the Extreme Path creatures rely on their innate ability to fight and their own use of Extreme Dao power.

It can be seen from this that the lord of the stone pupils is so wicked.

More importantly, the Lord of the Stone Pupil was the descendant of an Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, and that Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, the Extreme Dao Creature, had a very high place in the Extreme Path Deep Sea Palace.

Therefore, no Extreme Dao creature dares to provoke the Lord of the Stone Pupil.

It didn't take long for the Extreme Creature to arrive, and the auction officially began.

As time passed, a treasure of the Pole Dao was put up for auction, and a Pole Dao creature participated in the auction.

The extreme treasures auctioned here are rarer and more cherished, and they are all treasure resources that are difficult to buy in the outside world, otherwise there is no need to auction them at the auction.

Ye Tian took a fancy to several Extreme Dao treasures and also participated in the auction, but in the end, the bids of other Extreme Dao creatures were too high, and he still gave up.

After all, he was only interested in these Extreme Dao Treasures, and he wouldn't spend all the Extreme Dao Coins to buy them.

After a long time, an auction item caught Ye Tian's attention.

"Next up is the graveyard of a Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, Extreme Dao Creature. Everyone knows very well that our Extreme Creatures are all treasures, so many Extreme Creatures are afraid that their bodies will be used by other Extreme Creatures after death, so they build cemeteries for themselves and bury them in them after death. Among them, the graveyard of the Extreme Demon Ape was discovered, and now the auction is the quota for entering the Extreme Demon Ape Lord's cemetery, and this time the quota is provided by the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, so as long as the auction obtains the quota, you will inevitably be able to enter the cemetery. This time, only 100 places will be auctioned. "

"Now the first place to auction 1,000 Extreme Dao Coins!"

After the auctioneer of Extreme Creatures finished speaking, a group of Extreme Creatures became excited.

The graveyard of the Extreme Demon Ape, if you enter it and find a treasure, you will make a lot of money!

Therefore, it is worth paying some Extreme Coins to bid for a place!
